name: flash-4399-115225-dev
description: Local desktop experiment shell for the 4399 Flash game 115225.

scripts.build:mock:bag:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK='1'; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:bag-read:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_READ_MOCK='1'; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_GAMESTART_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_DISABLE_PET_MOCK_PATCH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:CODEX_DISABLE_SAVE_GUARD_PATCH='1'; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_PET_MOCK_PATCH_MODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:pet:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_GAMESTART_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:pet-only:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_GAMESTART_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_DISABLE_PET_MOCK_PATCH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:CODEX_DISABLE_SAVE_GUARD_PATCH='1'; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:pet-append-scan:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_GAMESTART_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_DISABLE_PET_MOCK_PATCH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:CODEX_DISABLE_SAVE_GUARD_PATCH='1'; $env:CODEX_PET_MOCK_PATCH_MODE='append-scan'; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:guard-only:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_ENABLE_GAMESTART_BAG_MOCK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:CODEX_DISABLE_PET_MOCK_PATCH='1'; Remove-Item Env:CODEX_DISABLE_SAVE_GUARD_PATCH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item -LiteralPath .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.before-runtime-mock-dark-pet-patch.swf -Destination .\modified\L4399Main_gamefile.swf -Force; node tools\patch-runtime-mock-dark-pet.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
scripts.build:mock:shop-buy:embedded: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { node tools\patch-api4399-shop-buy-local-success.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node tools\patch-xfbbv451-embed-gamefile.js; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
